description_long: This object is a single, medium-sized orange with a slightly oval shape and a textured, dimpled rind. Its surface is predominantly a warm orange color, with subtle variations in hue and some small patches of lighter and darker orange, indicating natural imperfections. The rind appears matte with a slightly rough texture, and there are a few visible blemishes and scuff marks, especially on one side. The orange is unpeeled, with no visible stem or leaves attached. Its size and form suggest it is fresh and suitable for consumption. The object would be commonly found in urban environments such as markets, grocery stores, or as litter on sidewalks and parks.
description: A medium-sized, oval orange with a dimpled, matte rind and natural blemishes. The surface is mostly warm orange with subtle color variations.
description_view_0: This view shows the orange with a prominent scuff mark and a slightly darker patch near the bottom.
description_view_1: This side displays a more uniform orange color with minor blemishes and a subtle shine in some areas.
description_view_2: Here, the orange has a lighter patch and a more even distribution of surface texture, with fewer visible marks.
description_view_3: This view reveals a smoother, lighter orange surface with a small dark spot near the top.
attribute_location_or_placement: market stall, grocery store, kitchen counter, sidewalk, park
